raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu darrijs to Sem-
mi/ un tohs Zilwekus/ un tohs
Lohpus/ kaſ Semmes Wirſu
trr/ zaur mannu ſeehu Spehku/
un zaur mannu iſſteeptu Elko-
nn/ un es dehmu to tam/ kam
(Dohr) es pareiſt ſchêttitſchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Nu tad/ es eſmu wiſtas
ſchahs Semmes NebukadNeza-
kam tam Kehnixam no Babe-
les/ mannam Kalpam Rohkâ
dewis/ fr patt tohs Swehrus
Laṅkâ eſmu es dewis wiṇṇam
kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſreem Laudis buhs
wiṇṇam/ un wiṇṇa Dehtam/
un wiṇṇa Dehta Dehtam kal-
poht/ teekams tas Laṅks wiṇṇa
Semmes arridfan nahkſ/ tad
likfees ſeeha Tantaſ/ un ſeeli
Kehnint no wiṇṇa kalpoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Laudis un ta Wat-
ſiba/ kaſ wiṇṇam/ Nebukad-
Nezaram tam Kehnixam no
Babeles ne kalpoht/ un kaſ fa-
wu Kaklu ne grib appakſch to
Juhgir ta Kehnixa no Babeles
ikt/ to paſchw Laṅku peemekle-
ſhu es ar Sohbinn/ un ar Bad-
du/ un ar Mehrt/ faſka tas
KUNGS: Teekams es teem
zaur wiṇṇa Rohku buhſchn Gal-
fu darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Juhs tad ne klaufajt juh-
ſeem Praweescheem/ un juhſeem
Stbhneceem/ un juhſeem Sap-
notajeem/ un juhſeem LaṅkaZee-
nitajeem/ un juhſeem Burw-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "jeem/ kaſ uhs jums ruuna/ un
fakka: Juhs ne kalpoſeet tam
Kehnixam no Babelês.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee fluddina jums
Mellus/ tadeht ka tee juhs tah-
tu no juhsfas Semmes atſchktex/
un es juhs iſdsennu / un juhs
bohjâ eetat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tee Laudis/kaſ ſawu
Kalſu padobs tam Juhgaim ta
Kehnixa no Babelês/ un wiṇ-
nam kalpoht/ tohs likſchu es fa-
wa Semmê palikt / faſka tas
KUNGS: Un tee to aplohpß/
un eekſch tahs dſihwohs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es runnaju pehz wiṣ-
teem ſcheem Wahrdeem us to
Kehnixu Jedekiju/ to Kehnixu no
Juha/ un tazziju: Padohdeet
juhfus Kalſus tam Juhgaim ta
Kehnixa no Babelês/ un kalpo-
jeet wiṇṇam / un wiṇṇa Lau-
dim/ tad juhs dſihwoſeet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kapehz juhs mirſeef? tu
un tawt Laudis zaur Sohbinu/
zaur Baddu/ un zaur Mehrt
Ka tas KUNGS irr runnajs no
teem Laudim/ kaſ tam Kehnt-
nam no Babelês ne kalpoht-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne klaufajt tad to Pra-
weſchu Wahrduſ/ kaſ us jums
feet tam Kehnixam no Babelês/
io tee fluddina jums Mellus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo es ne eſmu tohs ſub-
tiſs/ faſka tas KUNGS: Un tee
fluddina eekſch manna Wahrda
Mellus/ tadeht ka es juhs iſdsen-
nu/ un juhs bohjâ eetat/ juhs un
tee
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
